rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE THE MARY L. MCFADDEN SURVIVOR'S TRUST, ESTABLISHED TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Sur-Reply And Related Papers
rulings.Rulings: This tentative ruling is issued by Judge Stephen M. Murphy. Before the Court is Patricia McFadden's Motion to Strike Sur-Reply and Related Papers, filed December 2, 2024. A late opposition to the motion was filed January 13, 2024, without leave of court and with no showing of good cause for the untimeliness. The Court, in its discretion, will not consider the late-filed opposition papers (see, CRC, Rule 3.1300(d)). Counsel for Margaret and Ann McFadden is directed to file and serve papers according to the statutory deadlines going forward. Motion to Strike Sur-Reply and Related Papers is DENIED as moot. As the Reply states, the Motion is now substantively moot (Reply at 2:8). The Court stated in the December 6, 2024 Order Granting in Part and Denying in Part Motion for Summary Judgment or in the Alternative Summary Adjudication as to Trust Interpretation; Order Granting Leave to Amend, it had considered the improperly filed Sur-Reply, and stated the Sur-Reply did not impact the ruling (Order at 4:15-21). Contrary to the argument in the Reply, it would be procedurally illogical to strike the documents referenced in the December 6, 2024 Order from the record. The moving party shall lodge with the clerk in Department 204 by the time set for this hearing a proposed order consistent with this tentative ruling as published above. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. on the day before the hearing. To appear by Zoom, go to zoom.us and click "Join Meeting." Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765 and passcode 514879. To appear telephonically through Zoom, call 1-669-900-6833 and follow the prompts. Enter Meeting ID number 1602254765# and passcode 514879#. Parties appearing via Zoom should use their full names in the "Your Name" section. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling CourtCall at 1-888-882-6878 and obtaining an appearance access code for the hearing's scheduled date and time in Department 204.
